relations.note: Alt text requirement applies to all images produced under the photography/crop treatment rule.

quotes: Images are housed in the **Accent shape** (§2.5) — asymmetric rounded-corner crops, not plain rectangles or circles.
Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

rules.intent: Ensure imagery reinforces the brand's warm, everyday-life tone and uses the signature asymmetric crop device instead of generic rectangular/circular framing.
rules.rule_text: Photography must use warm, realistic patient lifestyle imagery (image_treatment.photography.warm_lifestyle) depicting real, everyday moments (walking the dog, beach, BBQ) that convey 'returning to everyday life.' Images are housed in the Accent shape — asymmetric rounded-corner crops (e.g. radius.accent_shape.large_email = 120px & 6px) — never plain rectangles or circles. Waves and gradients may overlay photography.

quotes: Every image requires **descriptive alt text** (brand accessibility rule).

rules.intent: Guarantee accessible experiences for users relying on screen readers or with images disabled.
rules.rule_text: Every image must include descriptive alt text, per the brand accessibility rule.
